description: This Kotlin source file defines the MainActivity class for an Android application. It sets up the main activity, initializes a TextView, and constructs a message by splitting, joining, and formatting text using utility classes.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: Main activity class for the Android app, responsible for UI setup and message display.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Lifecycle method called when activity is created; sets up the UI and initializes the message display.

methods.name: buildMessage
methods.description: Constructs a message string by splitting, joining, and capitalizing text elements.
